page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Analysis pipeline for metagenomic, microeukaryotic sequencing data.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Analysis tool for a reliable mapping to a provided microeukaryotic reference database and part of a comprehensive Snakemake workflow. It is used to assign taxonomic information to each NGS read by mapping to the database and filtering low quality assignments.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Analysis tool for a reliable mapping to a provided microeukaryotic reference database and part of a comprehensive Snakemake workflow. It is used to assign taxonomic information to each NGS read by mapping to the database and filtering low quality assignments.
